.wp-block-embed__wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0;
    padding-top: 56.25%;
}

.wp-block-embed__wrapper iframe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

/*お問い合わせ用追加CSS*/
table.CF7_table td{
	vertical-align: middle;
}

/*入力欄*/
.CF7_table input {
	border: 1px solid #d8d8d8;
	padding-left:0.8em;
  line-height: 2.5;	
}
.CF7_table textarea {
	border: 1px solid #d8d8d8;
	padding-left:0.8em;
  line-height: 1.2;	
}


.wpcf7 input[name^="your"] {
	width: 80%!important
}
.wpcf7 textarea {
	width: 80%!important
}
/*「必須」文字*/
.CF7_req{
	font-size:.9em;
	padding: 5px;
	background: #c9161d;/*秀光Red*/
	color: #fff;
	border-radius: 3px;
	margin-right:1em;
}

/*「任意」文字*/
.CF7_unreq{
	font-size:.9em;
	padding: 5px;
	background: #bdbdbd;/*グレー*/
	color: #fff;
	border-radius: 3px;
	margin-right:1em;
}



/* 「送信する」ボタン */
.wpcf7 input.wpcf7-submit{
  display       : inline-block;
  border-radius : 5%;
  font-size     : 120%;
  text-align    : center;
  cursor        : pointer;
  padding       : 12px 12px;
  background    : #c9161d;
  color         : #ffffff;
  line-height   : 1em;
  transition    : .3s;
  border        : 2px solid #c9161d;
}
.wpcf7 input.wpcf7-submit:hover {
  box-shadow    : none;
  color         : #c9161d;
  background    : #ffffff;
}

.CF7_btn{
	text-align:center;
	margin-top:20px;
}

.wpcf7-spinner{
	width:0;
	margin:0;
}

.wpcf7 form .wpcf7-response-output{
	text-align:center;
	border-color:#c9161d;
	color:#c9161d;
	padding:1em;
}

.wpcf7 form.sent .wpcf7-response-output {
	border-color: #46b450; /* Green */
	color:#46b450;	
}

.slider__caption{
	font-weight:normal;
}

.top-section__image--first{
	height:100%;
}

.catalog_new{

}

.catalog_new::after{
    content: "NEW";
    background-color: #c9161d;
		color:#ffffff;
	  margin-left:20px;
	  padding:1em;
}

.wp-block-table td,.wp-block-table th{border:0px solid;padding:.5em}

.wp-block-table {
	padding-top: min(3vw, 30px);
	padding-right: min(3vw, 100px);
	padding-bottom: min(3vw, 30px);
	padding-left: min(3vw, 100px);
	margin:0px;
}		</style>
		</head>
